Package io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project

Class HomeScreen

java.lang.Object
io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.HomeScreen
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.Screen, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Disposable
public class HomeScreen extends Object implements com.badlogic.gdx.Screen
Displays the screen that a player sees first with the big center play button

  • Constructor Details

    • HomeScreen

      public HomeScreen(Main game)
      Constructs the home screen and initializes its main assets.
      Parameters:
      game - the shared Main object used for assets, drawing, and screen switching

      Initializes the non-static fields

    • render

      public void render(float delta)
      renders (or draws) the screen, and uses delta to control movements
      Specified by:
      render in interface com.badlogic.gdx.Screen
      Parameters:
      delta - The time in seconds since the last render.

    • drawGhost

      private void drawGhost(Ghost g, float x, float y)
      Draws a ghost with the given parameters on the screen
      Parameters:
      g - the ghost object to be drawn
      x - the x position of the ghost
      y - the y position of the ghost

      public void resize(int width, int height)
      Resizes the screen using the parameters
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      width - the width of the screen to resize to
      height - the height of the screen to resize to
